core_mechanism: metriplectic (port-Hamiltonian) decomposition of a system's evolution into an energy-conserving skew-symmetric interconnection plus a dissipative gradient part, integrated by a structure-preserving scheme with fluctuation-dissipation-consistent stochastic forcing
brief_reason: The abstract explicitly builds a conservative gyroscopic interconnection plus a dissipative power-decay port evolved by a metriplectic integrator with a Fluctuation--Dissipation-consistent noise channel, which is the generic structure-preserving conservative-plus-dissipative dynamical machinery.
